title: sleepy's bamboo & sugarcane
description: Better textures for bamboo and sugarcane
body:
![Main Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/496024097d7f92a2bd5d8df7e177411e0f935b63.png)
This project changes the textures for bamboo and sugar cane to be more accurate to how it looks in real life.
- Sugar cane now has the texture of bamboo with a 3d model and one big stalk.
- Bamboo now has multiple smaller stalks and is still 3d.
This pack is inspired by this video: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/pakRFZaM1kI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
